text: {"claims":[{"statement":"The centrality of Wuhan's Huanan market in maps of December 2019 COVID-19 case residential locations, established by Worobey et al. (2022a), has recently been challenged by Stoyan and Chiu (2024, SC2024).","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The centrality of Wuhan's Huanan market in maps of December 2019 COVID-19 case residential locations, established by Worobey et al. (2022a), has recently been challenged by Stoyan and Chiu (2024, SC2024).","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that the previously established centrality has been challenged by the cited authors.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"SC2024 proposed a statistical test based on the premise that the measure of central tendency (hereafter, \"centre\") of a sample of case locations must coincide with the exact point from which local transmission began.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"SC2024 proposed a statistical test based on the premise that the measure of central tendency (hereafter, \"centre\") of a sample of case locations must coincide with the exact point from which local transmission began.","entailment":"The quote describes the methodological premise underlying SC2024's proposed statistical test.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"unspecified"},{"statement":"We show that this premise is erroneous.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"We show that this premise is erroneous.","entailment":"The authors assert that the premise described by SC2024 is incorrect, directly contradicting it.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"SC2024 put forward two alternative centres (centroid and mode) to the centre-point which was used by Worobey et al. for some analyses, and proposed a bootstrapping method, based on their premise, to test whether a particular location is consistent with it being the point source of transmission.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"SC2024 put forward two alternative centres (centroid and mode) to the centre-point which was used by Worobey et al. for some analyses, and proposed a bootstrapping method, based on their premise, to test whether a particular location is consistent with it being the point source of transmission.","entailment":"The sentence details the methodological alternatives and testing approach introduced by SC2024.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"unspecified"},{"statement":"We show that SC2024's concerns about the use of centre-points are inconsequential, and that use of centroids for these data is inadvisable.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"We show that SC2024's concerns about the use of centre-points are inconsequential, and that use of centroids for these data is inadvisable.","entailment":"The authors claim that the concerns raised are unimportant and that centroids should not be used for the data set.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The mode is an appropriate, even optimal, choice as centre;","claimType":"value","quote":"The mode is an appropriate, even optimal, choice as centre;","entailment":"The authors evaluate the mode as a suitable and superior central measure.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"Contrary to SC2024's results, we demonstrate that with proper implementation of their methods, the mode falls at the entrance of a parking lot at the market itself, and the 95% confidence region around the mode includes the market.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"however, contrary to SC2024's results, we demonstrate that with proper implementation of their methods, the mode falls at the entrance of a parking lot at the market itself, and the 95% confidence region around the mode includes the market.","entailment":"The authors provide empirical evidence that the correctly applied method places the mode at the market entrance and its confidence region encompasses the market.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Thus, the market cannot be rejected as central even by SC2024's overly stringent statistical test.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Thus, the market cannot be rejected as central even by SC2024's overly stringent statistical test.","entailment":"The statement concludes that, despite SC2024's test, the market remains a plausible central location.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Our results directly contradict SC2024's and -- together with myriad additional lines of evidence overlooked by SC2024, including crucial epidemiological information -- point to the Huanan market as the early epicentre of the COVID-19 pandemic.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Our results directly contradict SC2024's and -- together with myriad additional lines of evidence overlooked by SC2024, including crucial epidemiological information -- point to the Huanan market as the early epicentre of the COVID-19 pandemic.","entailment":"The authors claim that their findings, along with other evidence, identify the market as the
